title: Pre-travel consultation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

medication.text: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.
medication.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded medical, immunization, medicine, prior-travel, destination and special-risk assessment without calculating risk.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports recording medical history, special conditions, immunization history, medicines, prior travel, timing, reason, travel style, activities, destination disease context and special-risk groups without calculating risk or recommending intervention.

referral.text: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.
referral.rationale: Relevant to documenting itinerary, duration, purpose, activities, health background and consultation limits without generating advice.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports documenting health background, itinerary, trip duration, purpose, planned activities, country-specific context, consultation limits and need for specialist input without generating advice.

exact_section.heading: Components of a pre-travel consultation
exact_section.locator: official chapter section “Components of a pre-travel consultation”

sources_used.title: The Pre-Travel Consultation
sources_used.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires destination-specific and UAE adaptation

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Destination, itinerary, timing, purpose, activities, health history, pregnancy, immunity, vaccines, medicines and special risks are absent.
No risk classification, vaccine, medicine, dose, advice, certificate, restriction or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
